---
species: "Botrylloides violaceous"
accepted_code: "BOVI"
alternate_codes: # "tunicate_BOVI" 
diminutive: 
alternate_diminutives: 
common_name: "orange sheath tunicate"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "orange, thin, fleshy" 
image: '/header_images/Botrylloides violaceus image.jpeg'
image_credit: 'Photo from Melissa Frey, Royal BC Museum, Canada via NEMESIS (https://invasions.si.edu/nemesis/species_summary/-100)' 
categories:
  - tunicates 
sampling_programs:
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_microquad
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 35000901
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 148715
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<Chain tunicate typically orange and fleshy.
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->[WORMS page](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=taxdetails&id=148715)
